g.title: public.attribute:model_key->public.logic:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, derivation_policy_key) REFERENCES logic(model_key, logic_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.attribute:model_key->public.data_type:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, data_type_key) REFERENCES data_type(model_key, data_type_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.attribute:model_key->public.class:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, class_key) REFERENCES class(model_key, class_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.class_index:model_key->public.attribute:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, attribute_key) REFERENCES attribute(model_key, attribute_key) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.attribute_invariant:model_key->public.attribute:model_key
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (model_key, attribute_key) REFERENCES attribute(model_key, attribute_key) ON DELETE CASCADE
